programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A twenty-something real estate agent and brain tumour survivor is eager to buy her first home in Nashville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Anaheim, California that is being offered as an all-cash sale with no inspections and no contingencies.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A New Jersey couple decides to move to Guadalajara, Mexico, for a job offer at The American School Foundation of Guadalajara.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Silicon Valley couple is on the hunt for a new home in San Jose, CA. She's looking for a charming Craftsman, but he wants a more contemporary home.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young professional dreams of a hip condo near all the nightlife in Denver.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A single father uses his $1 million winnings to look for the perfect forever home in Richmond, VA.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: A pair of first-time flippers is in over their heads renovating a historic Cottage Home property.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: Alison takes on the home of a dear friend and famous chef Antonia Lofaso, and the pressure's on to deliver a spectacular chef's kitchen.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Ray Romano teams up with Jonathan and Drew to gift his friend and assistant of 23 years with a spa-like upgrade to her main suite.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: Ben and Cristi design an open concept living area with vaulted ceilings for a woman who bought a downtown home to honour her late father.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.desc: Partners and their two dogs are leaving the beaches of Cape Cod for a cabin in Norway, Maine.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: A partnership is tested by a tough flip in Anaheim, California.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: After buying a home sight unseen in Old Southside, Mina and Karen soon realise they need to tear the whole building down.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Fran Drescher teams up with Jonathan and Drew to upgrade outdated living spaces for her housekeepers of 30 years, whom she considers family.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: Alison makes a deal on the hacienda and gets her first Vegas flip, but she needs the property to sell for $2 million or she'll lose her profit share.

programme.title: Mash-Up Our Home
programme.desc: A couple tasks Kele and Christina with merging colourful, California mission flair into their home while staying true to its historic Tudor character.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: After over a decade of hurricane seasons, a family is tired of having to evacuate from their small rental every year.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Texas couple debates between posh apartment life and something more budget-friendly in London.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A chef and his wife look for a bigger place in Chicago, but can't agree on what to buy. He wants a modern-style loft in the city.

programme.title: Betting on Paradise
programme.desc: With news threatening to derail the entire project, Steph and Luke come up with an emergency plan. But it all hinges on completing the casita suites.

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple with a baby on the way asks Jenn to make their midcentury modern home more functional while staying true to its 1950s style.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple wants a house suitable for dance parties. With a unique style in mind, Brian and Mika aim for a home that'll sweep them off their feet!

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After nine years of medical school, a newly qualified doctor and his wife search for their Alabama dream home.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: A house that looks like a boat, a home with carpet up the walls and a place that looks like a UFO compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith pays homage to Evan's impressive background in physics! He pushes the laws of nature and design to create a stunning and scientific dream home.

programme.desc: A partnership is tested by a tough flip in Anaheim, California.

programme.desc: A Frank Sinatra impersonator finds new demand for his Las Vegas show south of the border.

programme.desc: A Tampa couple searches for a larger house with room for future kids. However, she wants a Mediterranean-style home with a pool-spa combination.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on a couple's chopped-up ranch house to transform into a bold statement that celebrates rustic elements and a glam open concept.

programme.title: Betting on Paradise
programme.desc: With just days until the combined wedding and grand opening, the team kicks construction into overdrive. The knockout pool bar surpasses expectations.

programme.desc: After a $3 million lottery win, David helps a mother search for a starter home for her eldest daughter in Rochester, New York.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An artistic couple leaves city life to pursue their passions in laid-back Norfolk Island, Australia.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Greenville, South Carolina, family of six wants to move from their small townhouse into something bigger.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: Best friends return to flip a friend's rental in beautiful Park City, Utah.With some help from Chip and Jo, the girls take on a new set of challenges.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: A successful Connecticut mum tackles her first fixer and hopes it will empower her daughter to feel like she can do anything.

programme.title: Married to Real Estate
programme.desc: A family is anxious to get out of his mother's house and find a place of their own. They're looking for a home with an open design for entertaining.

programme.title: The Flipping El Moussas
programme.desc: Tarek and Heather get an insider deal from Tarek's mum on a house in Anaheim Hills, but it quickly becomes a greater venture than they expected.

programme.title: Married to Real Estate
programme.desc: Mike and Egypt look to get a family out of their tiny New York City apartment and into the perfect place in Marietta, Georgia.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn tackle the renovation of a house in Kailua with an outdated '80s style, disgusting pool and a costly, failing retaining wall.

programme.desc: A couple looks to move out of their tiny Brooklyn rental and buy a home in New Jersey. She wants a historic house in the suburbs to start a family.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple from Agoura Hills, CA, fulfills their dream of living the Chianti way of life in Italy.
